Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Appointing Successors-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successors-In­Interest For Deceased Plaintiff, And Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint Pursuant To Stipulation And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-19-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROSS MAKASIAN's Motion For An Order Appointing Successors-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successors-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff, And Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint Pursuant To Stipulation And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is OFF CALENDAR, no valid proof of service on file. Proof of service dated July 26, 2022 appears to indicate that Plaintiff's motion was electronically served by an individual employed by Defendant's counsel on Plaintiff. No e-mail address of the person making the service is listed. CCP 1013b(b)(1). Judge Harry L. Jacobs, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
